meaning: n.(通过遥测、电话、电视等手段求诊的)远距离医学
examples: Telemedicine can take the place of usual health care.
Different states have markedly different regulations for telemedicine.
Rules defining and regulating telemedicine differ widely from state to state.
Another will use local health networks and telemedicine to help Afghans with mental health conditions.
Results are displayed quickly in an easy-to-read format and all devices are compatible with telemedicine networks.
